calendar.matters:
JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Russell Smith.
Dept: 514. Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Michele L. Scott, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 318 Turk I7, LP, a Delaware limited partnership.
Ebe Kiis, Associate Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and tesified.
No appearance by defendant Russell Smith.
Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer was filed on July 3, 2019.
Defendant Russell Smith filed his answer to plaintiff's complaint on July 12, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on August 9, 2019, setting trial for today, August 26, 2019.
DOE defendants dismissed today, August 26, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff 318 Turk I7, LP, a Delaware limited partnership, and against defendant Russell Smith, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,507.70.
Holdover Damages - $3,536.96.

Total - $6,044.66.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 320 Turk Street, Unit 608, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff 318 Turk is present. Represented by Ebe Kiis.
Attorney Michele Scott for the plaintiff.
Defendant Russell Smith is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of August 26, 2019 remains on calendar. (501)
